mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user_data (user_id, user_data_name, user_data, is_delete, create_time, create_user) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{user_data_name}, #{user_data}, 0, NOW(), #{create_user})
mapper.select: SELECT data_id, user_id, user_data_name, user_data FROM tb_user_data WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_delete = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
